title: ShopSignal MCP Server
description: Run this Actor in Standby mode to expose the ShopSignal MCP server. For direct (non-MCP) invocation, call any of the 4 tools by name with the matching input.

tool.title: Tool name
tool.description: Which ShopSignal tool to invoke when running directly (not via MCP).

url.title: Store URL
url.description: DTC store URL — used by get_store_snapshot and detect_drops_and_restocks.

product_url.title: Product URL
product_url.description: Specific product URL — used by track_product_price.

brand_urls.title: Brand URLs
brand_urls.description: List of 2-10 DTC store URLs to compare across — used by compare_products_across_brands.

max_per_brand.title: Max results per brand
max_per_brand.description: Maximum matches per brand for compare_products_across_brands.

max_products.title: Max products in snapshot
max_products.description: Cap on number of products returned by get_store_snapshot.

include_variants.title: Include variants
include_variants.description: Include size/color variants in snapshot (recommended for fashion).

match_method.title: Match method
match_method.description: How to match products across brands — used by compare_products_across_brands.
